infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: TryOn uses your camera to photograph clothing items for virtual try-on.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: TryOn uses your photo library to upload your body photos and clothing images.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: TryOn saves your try-on results to your photo library.

plugins.cameraPermission: TryOn uses your camera to photograph clothing items.

plugins.photosPermission: TryOn accesses your photos to let you upload body and clothing images.
